CREATE TABLE test_union (id INT, value STRING);
SELECT union_value(tag := (SELECT value FROM test_union WHERE id = 1));
CREATE TABLE test_union2 (id INT, value STRING);
SELECT union_value(tag := (SELECT value FROM test_union UNION SELECT value FROM test_union2));
WITH temp_union AS (SELECT union_value(tag := value) FROM test_union) SELECT * FROM temp_union;
SELECT union_value(tag := (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_union WHERE value LIKE '%o%'));
CREATE TABLE test_union3 (id INT, val INT);
SELECT union_value(tag := (SELECT value FROM test_union WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_union2)));
SELECT union_value(tag := 'Static Value') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_union WHERE id = 3);
